what_it_does: Defines a systemd oneshot service unit that runs a Python script to perform an incremental refresh of a company structural ledger.
observations: Type=oneshot indicates a single-run, non-daemon task
StandardOutput and StandardError are both directed to the systemd journal
After=default.target and WantedBy=default.target tie activation to the normal user/session target
standouts: Hard-coded absolute paths referencing a specific user's home directory and a project virtualenv
Explicit journal logging for both stdout and stderr
Unit name and description frame the task as an incremental refresh of 'the-one-system structural ledger'
conventions: Follows standard systemd unit section ordering: [Unit], [Service], [Install]
Uses Type=oneshot for a one-off maintenance command
concerns: Absolute paths under /home/tim make the unit non-portable across users or hosts
No visible error-handling, restart, or failure policy
No explicit User= directive, so the runtime identity depends on who enables/starts the unit
notes: A one-shot systemd unit that triggers an incremental ledger rebuild from the project virtualenv.
questions: Is this intended as a user service or a system service given the home-directory paths and default.target?
How is the unit triggered or scheduled — manually, by a timer, or by another service?
What does ledger_build.py --incremental update, and how does it signal success or failure?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an incremental refresh of the company ledger, and the ExecStart runs ledger_build.py --incremental, so they align.
intention_signals: The file seems to be trying to integrate a project-specific ledger refresh script into the normal systemd runtime as a logged, one-shot maintenance task.
contribution: Provides a systemd-native entry point for running the ledger refresh script, capturing the intended command, working directory, logging target, and activation target in a declarative unit file.
summary_for_embedding: A systemd oneshot service unit that runs /home/tim/company/ops/ledger_build.py --incremental from /home/tim/company using a project virtualenv and logs output to the journal.
intention_for_embedding: To integrate the company ledger incremental refresh script into systemd's default target as a logged, one-shot maintenance task.
